Ukraine Conflict News





15 June 2025 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Baiba Braže: we are of one mind with U.S. Ambassador to NATO Whitaker on the importance for all the Allies at The Hague NATO Summit to agree on a spending increase Latvia MFA 15 Jun 2025 -- Preparations for the NATO Summit in The Hague (24-26 June), contributions to security of Latvia and the Alliance, defence procurement, the United States military presence in Latvia - those were the main topic that the Minister of Foreign Affairs Baiba Braže discussed with the United States Ambassador to NATO Matthew G. Whitaker.

  • Taiwan's indigenous submarine undergoes final stage of harbor trials CNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Taiwan's first domestically built submarine was spotted undergoing trials at a southern harbor on Saturday, with a source close to the matter confirming to CNA that the tests were part of the final stage of harbor trials before moving on to sea trials.

  • PH, Japan conduct 2nd bilateral exercises in WPS Philippine News Agency 15 Jun 2025 -- Filipino military units and their counterparts from the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force (JMSDF) conducted the second bilateral maritime cooperative activity (MCA) within the West Philippine Sea (WPS) over the weekend, the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) said Sunday.

  • UK to send more RAF jets to West Asia as Israel, Iran exchange attacks Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says London is deploying additional RAF fighter jets to West Asia to help defend Israel, after Iran launched a fresh round of missile attacks on the occupying entity.

  • Secretary Rubio's Call with Mexican Foreign Secretary de la Fuente US Dept. of State 15 Jun 2025

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Israeli fire kills nearly 60 civilians in Gaza, many at aid site Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli regime forces have killed nearly 60 Palestinian civilians in the besieged Gaza Strip, at least 17 of whom were trying to get humanitarian aid amid an all-out Israeli blockade and aggression.

  • Israel declares complete lockdown in West Bank amid intensified offensive Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Israel has placed the occupied West Bank under a complete lockdown, as the regime's military intensifies its military offensive across the occupied Palestinian territory.

  • Chief of General Staff of Yemeni Armed Forces survives Israeli assassination attempt: Report Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Chief of the General Staff of the Yemeni Armed Forces, Major General Mohammed Abdul Karim al-Ghamari, has reportedly survived an assassination attempt after Israeli fighter jets carried out an airstrike against an area in the Arab nation's capital.
  • Yemeni army salutes Iran, targets sensitive Israeli sites with hypersonic missiles Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Yemeni army has extended its salutations to the Iranian Armed Forces over their all-out attacks against Israeli military bases and strategic sites, stressing that the Arab nation's military has executed a series of ballistic missile strikes against sensitive positions within the occupied Palestinian territories.
  • Houthis Claim Multiple Hypersonic Missile Attacks on Tel Aviv in Coordination With Iran Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- Yemen's Ansar Allah movement, also known as the Houthis, said on Sunday that in coordination with Iran it had carried out multiple attacks on Israel's Tel Aviv using a hypersonic ballistic missile over the past 24 hours.

    • Operation Rising Lion / Operation True Promise III

  • Statement by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 15 Jun 2025
  • PM Netanyahu in Bat Yam Israel - Prime Minister 15 Jun 2025
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with German FM Wadephul - 15 June 2025 Israel MFA 15 Jun 2025
  • FM Sa'ar briefs ambassadors, heads of mission and diplomats in Israel Israel MFA 15 Jun 2025
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with Chinese FM Wang Yi Israel MFA 15 Jun 2025
  • Embattled Netanyahu urges US to join Israeli regime's war against Iran: Report Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli regime has urged the United States to join its war against the Islamic Republic of Iran to achieve the "elimination" of the country's nuclear energy program, according to a report.
  • Israel Urged US to Join It in Conflict With Iran - Reports Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- Israel has been asking the United States to join it in the conflict with Iran for the past two days, the Axios news portal reported on Sunday, citing two Israeli officials.
  • The Chief of the General Staff: People of Israel, I promise you - anyone who harms you will pay and is paying a heavy price, anywhere and in every arena. Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025

  • The IAF Struck Launchers and Surface-to-Surface Missiles Aimed at Israel's Home Front Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • Approximately 50 Fighter Jets Struck Infrastructure and Targets of the Iranian Nuclear Project in Tehran Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • Following the Statement by the IDF Spokesperson, BG Effie Defrin Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • IAF strikes on surface-to-air missile launchers in Tehran Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Has Completed a Wide-Scale Wave of Strikes To Degrade the Iranian Regime's Weapons Production Capabilities Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • The IAF and Israeli Navy intercepted over 100 UAVs launched from Iran Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • Press Briefing by IDF Spokesperson BG Effie Defrin-June 15, 2025 Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • Press Briefing by IDF Spokesperson, BG Effie Defrin-June 15, 2025 Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • The Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir, on a Situational Assessment in the IAF Underground Operations Center Israel Defense Forces 15 Jun 2025
  • Israel continues to hit residential buildings in Tehran IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli regime has been carrying out strikes on residential buildings in the capital, Tehran, killing and wounding civilians.
  • Israel keeps targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Israel continues to carry out attacks on Iran's civilian infrastructure despite claims that its operations have only targeted military personnel and people related to Iran's nuclear program.
  • Blaze at Tehran's Shahran, Rey oil depots extinguished following Israeli air strikes Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The director of the supply and distribution department at the National Iranian Oil Products Distribution Company (NIOPDC) says fire brigades have managed to extinguish blazes at two major oil depots in Tehran following Israeli strikes, stressing that activities at fuel stations across the Iranian capital are going on normally.
  • Israeli assaults disproportionately killed civilians, especially women and children: Iran's health minister Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Health Minister Mohammadreza Zafarghandi says the majority of the victims of Israeli assaults on Iran in recent days are civilians, including a significant number of women and children.

  • Civilians In Israel, Iran Seek Shelter, Brace For New Waves Of Attacks RFE/RL 15 Jun 2025 -- Civilians in both Israel and Iran sought cover as waves of air strikes hit major cities late on June 14 and early on June 15, with the latest armed conflict between the archenemies showing no signs of easing despite international calls for peace.

  • Israel shuts down parts of its largest refinery after Iran attack Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Israel's largest oil refinery has been forced to shut down parts of its operations following a major missile attack by Iran.
  • Armed Forces to Israelis: Leave! Occupied territories will not be inhabitable soon. IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Armed Forces have warned people in Israel to leave the Israeli-occupied territories while they can as punitive Iranian strikes will be targeting the entire Israeli-held territories.
  • Iran starts new round of strikes on Israel IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- A new salvo of missiles and drones has been launched at targets in Israel amid continued Israeli aggression on Iran.
  • 44 Israeli drones shot down along Iran's borders: Border Guards IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Border Guards has announced that 44 Israeli drones and quadcopters have been intercepted and destroyed in border areas over the past 48 hours.
  • Armed Forces launch new wave of ballistic missiles at Israel IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran launched a new wave of ballistic missile strikes at Israel as part of its retaliatory operation dubbed True Promise 3.
  • Armed Forces begin new round of punitive strikes on Israel IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- The Armed Forces have begun a new round of punitive strikes on targets inside Israel in an anticipated wave of retaliation.
  • 'Leave to save your lives': Iran's armed forces warn Israeli settlers in occupied territories Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Iranian armed forces have issued a stern warning to Israeli settlers in the occupied territories, urging them to evacuate immediately as Iran prepares to launch widespread strikes across the entire occupied land.
  • Iran downs 44 Israeli drones along borders in 48 hours Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The commander of Iran's border police says Iranian forces have shot down 44 Israeli drones and quadcopters along the borders over the past 48 hours.
  • True Promise III: Iran attacks Israel with fresh salvo of retaliatory missiles Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) launched a fresh wave of missile and drone strikes against the Zionist regime.
  • Missiles that hit Haifa last night were used for first time: Source tells Press TV Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The missiles that struck Haifa in the Israeli-occupied territories last night were used for the first time by the Iranian Armed Forces, an informed source tells Press TV.
  • A massive barrage of Iranian missiles hits Zionist entity as Yemen strikes Tel Aviv Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The fresh wave of Iranian missile strikes targeted the heart of the Zionist entity in the early hours of Sunday as the Yemeni military reportedly struck the Ben Gurion Airport in Tel Aviv.
  • New Wave of Iranian Missiles Hits Targets in Haifa, Tel Aviv - Reports Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- A new wave of Iranian missiles hit targets in the Israeli cities of Haifa and Tel Aviv, Iranian state news agency IRNA reported on Sunday.
  • Iran Launches Third Wave of Strikes Against Israel - State TV Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran has been carrying out retaliatory strikes against Israel after the latter had attacked Iran's nuclear facilities as well as residential areas on Friday night.
  • Iranian Missiles Strike Central Israel, Including Tel Aviv Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- Israel activated air defense systems to repel Iranian missile attack on center of country, including Tel Aviv, explosions were heard in the sky above the city.

  • Two Mossad operatives arrested in Alborz Province IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Two infiltrators linked to the Israeli Mossad spy agency have been arrested in Savojbolagh county, Alborz Province, according to the police.
  • Security forces arrest Mossad terrorist team in northwestern Iran Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iranian security forces have arrested two terrorist elements of the Israeli regime's Mossad spy agency in northwestern Iran.

  • President vows more 'crushing response' if Israeli aggression continues IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says the Iranian Armed Forces will give a "more crushing and painful response" to the Israeli regime if the act of aggression against the country continues.
  • Iran calls for united Islamic response to Israeli aggression IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has urged Islamic countries to take collective action against escalating violations of international law by Israel.
  • Iran does not want to see the war spreading to the region and beyond: Foreign minister IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi says the Islamic Republic does not want war to spread to other countries in the region, adding that Iranian missile strikes at Israel were in self-defense and would stop if the Israeli regime halted its aggression.
  • Iran reaffirms self-reliance in defense after Israeli strikes: Foreign minister IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi says that the Islamic Republic places its trust only in its own forces for defending its national security.
  • Army chief vows to defend Iran's territorial integrity 'to the last breath' IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- The chief commander of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army has pledged unwavering defense of Iran's independence and territorial integrity in the face of Israeli assaults, saying the Army will strike hard at Israel in response to its acts of aggression.
  • I.R.G.C. warns that Iran will intensify military actions against Israel if hostilities continue IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (I.R.G.C.) has warned that Iran's military response will escalate if Israeli hostilities persist.
  • Baqaei says targeting residential areas constitutes a serious violation of U.N. Charter IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei has described targeting residential areas by the Israeli regime as a serious and unambiguous violation of international law and the Charter of the United Nations.
  • President Pezeshkian: U.S. pressure strategy on Iran proven to be a failure IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says that the United States' strategy of imposing demands on Iran through pressure and aggression has proven to be a failure, rebuking Washington's support for Israeli assaults against Iran.
  • French president spins facts of Iran's nuclear program: Foreign Ministry spokesperson IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei says French President Emmanuel Macron is seeking to spin the facts of Iran's nuclear program.
  • Foreign Ministry spokesperson slams German officials' remarks IRNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei says those "on the wrong side of history best stay silent now."
  • 'War crime': Iran's foreign ministry building hit during Israeli aggression; many injured Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran's foreign ministry has strongly condemned the Israeli military aggression on one of its buildings in the capital, Tehran, which left many people injured, including ministry staff.
  • War against Zionist regime progressing with prudence and management: Ex-IRGC chief Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- War against the Zionist regime is progressing with prudence and management, former Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (IRGC) chief Major General Mohsen Rezaei says.
  • IRGC vows to fight on until regime's 'destruction' after intelligence chief's martyrdom Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the martyrdom of its top intelligence official in Israeli aggression, vowing to continue striking the Zionist entity until its "complete destruction."
  • Israeli strike on Natanz nuclear facility 'crime against international law, NPT': Iran FM Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the Israeli strikes on the Islamic Republic's Natanz nuclear facility were a big crime under international law and the Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT).
  • Iran FM calls on Muslim nations to confront Israel's lawlessness, aggression Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has called on Muslim nations to take united action to confront Israel's increasing lawlessness and acts of aggression against the countries in the region.
  • Israel's aggression: Iran president urges Iraq to protect its borders, airspace Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says the Israeli acts of aggression against Iran's territory from the Iraqi airspace were a clear manifestation of the regime's disregard for international law.
  • Iran not seeking war but won't hesitate to defend itself: President Pezeshkian Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the Islamic Republic has never sought war and bloodshed but will by no means hesitate to powerfully defend itself against the enemies' threats.
  • US complicit in Israeli attacks, must be held accountable: Araghchi Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Iranian foreign minister says the United States must accept its responsibility for Israel's deadly aggression against the country as multiple evidence shows American forces helped the regime wage its terrorist assault.
  • Tehran slams German, French hypocrisy in wake of Israeli aggression against Iran Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Iran has hit out at Germany and France for supporting Israel's blatant aggression against the country and distorting facts about Iran's peaceful nuclear activities.

  • Ranking Member Smith Statement on Conflict Between Israel and Iran House Armed Services Committee - Democrats 15 Jun 2025
  • US had nothing to do with Israeli latest attack on Iran, reads Trump social media post Global Times 15 Jun 2025 -- US President Donald Trump wrote in a post on his Social Truth platform on Sunday that "the US had nothing to do with the attack on Iran, tonight," while warning that "If we are attacked in any way, shape or form by Iran, the full strength and might of the US Armed Forces will come down on you at levels never seen before."
  • In a volte-face, Trump claims US 'had nothing to do' with Israel's attacks on Iran Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- US President Donald Trump in a social media post claimed that the US "had nothing to do" with the Israeli regime's Saturday night attacks against Iran, two days after he called the attacks "excellent" and suggested there was "more to come."
  • Trump Says 'Possible' US Could Get Involved In Iran-Israel Conflict As Air Strikes Continue For Third Day RFE/RL 15 Jun 2025 -- President Donald Trump said the United States is not involved in the conflict between Iran and Israel, but as the archenemies launched a fresh barrage of air strikes at each other, he admitted it's "possible" that will change.

  • Statement by UNICEF Executive Director Catherine Russell on the children killed by the alarming escalation of violence in the Middle East UNICEF 15 Jun 2025

  • Israel/Iran: Statement by the High Representative on behalf of the European Union European External Action Service (EEAS) 15 Jun 2025 -- The European Union is following very closely the situation in the Middle East and expresses its deepest concern at the dangerous escalation that threatens to destabilise the Middle East following Israeli strikes on Iran and Iran's response. The EU reiterates its strong commitment to regional security, including the security of the State of Israel, and calls on all sides to abide by international law, show restraint and refrain from taking further steps which could lead to serious consequences such as potential radioactive release.
  • Israel's aggression against Iran could spark regional conflict, Qatar warns Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- Qatar has warned that Israel's acts of aggression against Iran risk sparking a broader conflict in West Asia.
  • Iraqi Hezbollah threatens to hit US bases if Washington aids Israeli aggression on Iran Press TV 15 Jun 2025 -- The Iraqi Kataib Hezbollah has warned that Washington's regional interests and bases will come under attack if the United States assists in the Israeli aggression against Iran.
  • Press release Romania - Ministry of Foreign Affairs 15 Jun 2025 -- "The Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) expresses its profound concern regarding the escalating security situation in the Middle East."
  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 15 Jun 2025
  • HRH the Crown Prince Discusses Regional De-escalation with Greek Prime Minister SPA 15 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call today from Prime Minister of the Hellenic Republic Kyriakos Mitsotakis
  • Israel's Attacks on Iran's Nuclear Facilities Set Dangerous Precedent - Wang Yi Sputnik 15 Jun 2025 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi warned that Israel's attacks on Iran's nuclear facilities have set a perilous precedent with potentially catastrophic repercussions, during a telephone call with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Saturday.

    • Other Conflicts

  • PLA Southern Theater Command organizes a joint sea and air patrol in SCS Saturday: theater command spokesperson Global Times 15 Jun 2025 -- PLA Southern Theater Command organized a joint sea and air patrol in the South China Sea on Saturday, Senior Colonel Tian Junli, a spokesperson for the PLA Southern Theater Command, stated on Sunday, emphasizing that any military activities that stir up trouble in the South China Sea and create hotspot issues are fully under control.
  • Chinese military conducts sea and air patrols in South China Sea on June 14 PRC MND 15 Jun 2025 -- The Southern Theater Command (STC) of Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) conducted joint sea and air patrols in the South China Sea on June 14, said Air Force Senior Colonel Tian Junli, a spokesperson for the STC, on Sunday.

News Reports

  • First ever female MI6 chief appointed Gov.UK 15 Jun 2025 -- The first ever female Chief of the Secret Intelligence Service (MI6) has been announced by the Prime Minister today.

  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 15 Jun 2025

  • Special Representative of the Chinese Government on Latin American Affairs Qiu Xiaoqi Visits Cuba PRC MofA 15 Jun 2025

  • 'No political force' can stop cross-strait exchanges: Ex-President Ma CNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Former Republic of China (Taiwan) President Ma Ying‑jeou (馬英九) attended the 17th Straits Forum held in the city of Xiamen in China's Fujian Province on Sunday, telling the audience that "no political force" can prevent cross-strait exchanges.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 15 Jun 2025

  • Steps for Coping with Disastrous Abnormal Weather Taken in DPRK KCNA 15 Jun 2025 -- Efforts have been directed to coping with a disastrous abnormal weather in the coal industry sector of the DPRK.

  • PM call with President of the United Arab Emirates His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan: 15 June 2025 Gov.UK 15 Jun 2025

  • Joint statement between the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and the Prime Minister of Canada Gov.UK 15 Jun 2025 -- "Today, Sir Keir Starmer, Prime Minister of the United Kingdom (UK) and Mark Carney, Prime Minister of Canada met in Ottawa to reaffirm the profound friendship and shared values that unite both nations."
  • PM meeting with Prime Minister Carney of Canada: 15 June 2025 Gov.UK 15 Jun 2025
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Prime Minister of the United Kingdom Sir Keir Starmer Prime Minister of Canada 15 Jun 2025 -- Today, the Prime Minister, Mark Carney, met with the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom (UK), Sir Keir Starmer.

  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Chancellor of Germany Friedrich Merz Prime Minister of Canada 15 Jun 2025
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with President of South Africa Cyril Ramaphosa Prime Minister of Canada 15 Jun 2025
  • Prime Minister Carney meets with Prime Minister of Australia Anthony Albanese Prime Minister of Canada 15 Jun 2025
  • Secretary Rubio's Call with Canadian Minister of Foreign Affairs Anand US Dept. of State 15 Jun 2025

  • Minister Akazawa's Telephone Talk with Secretary Lutnick Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 15 Jun 2025
